introduction: This presentation will examine the changes in our workforce during March 2025. We will focus on employment adjustments and their impact on Lee's Market.

subsections.heading: Overview of Workforce Changes
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market expanded its workforce by 15% in 2024
• 20% of hires were for the logistics department to improve supply chain efficiency
• We implemented a new employee training program in Q1 of 2025
• Average employee tenure at Lee's Market is 5 years
• Employee turnover rate saw a 2% increase in Q4 of 2024
• We boosted our focus on employee benefits and wellness in 2025
subsections.justification: These points provide an overview of overall workforce changes but do not specify job losses in March 2025.

subsections.heading: Analysis of Job Losses in March
subsections.content:
• Total job losses in the retail industry increased by 3% in Q1 2025
• Unemployment rates in British Columbia were higher in Q1 2025 compared to the prior year
• The grocery sector was less impacted by job losses compared to other retail sectors
• Job losses were higher in companies with over 10,000 employees
• Online retail companies saw a decrease in job losses in March 2025
subsections.justification: These points discuss job losses in a broader context, but do not provide specifics about Lee's Market in March 2025.

subsections.heading: Impact on Operational Efficiency
subsections.content:
• Our investment in automation led to a 10% increase in operational efficiency in 2024
• The new inventory management system reduced stock discrepancies by 5% in Q1 2025
• We improved our order fulfillment rate by 7% in March 2025
• Customer satisfaction scores related to product availability increased by 8% in Q1 2025
• Our new delivery partnership reduced shipping times by 15% in March 2025
subsections.justification: These points discuss operational efficiency but do not address job losses in Lee's Market in March 2025.

conclusion: The workforce adjustment in March has affected our operations, and it is necessary to strategically plan for future staffing needs. Let's discuss and explore potential strategies to mitigate these impacts moving forward.

image_queries.slide_title: Analysis of Job Losses in March
